name: Latkes (Potato Pancakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel two large potatoes and put them in a food processor with the onion and some water.
2. Process until smooth, then drain through paper towels in a colander.
3. In a separate dish, beat the egg with pepper, salt, and add to the drained potato mixture.
4. Stir well, then stir in flour.
5. Either make one large pancake or drop by 1/4 cup into hot oil and flatten.
6. Fry over medium heat until golden brown on the outside.
7. Serve with tzadiki (tzatziki), yoghurt, sour cream, or applesauce.
Makes a meal.
